vocab.sentence: Is he from Japan? Yes, he is.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 他來自日本嗎？是的，他是。

vocab.sentence: Are you from the USA? No, I'm not.
vocab.sentence_chinese: 你來自美國嗎？不，我不是。

phrases.sentence: Where are you from? I'm from Taiwan.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 你從哪裡來？我來自台灣。

phrases.sentence: Don't give up. All roads lead to Rome.
phrases.sentence_chinese: 不要放棄。條條大路通羅馬。

tips.label: Where are you from?
tips.text: 詢問「你來自哪裡？」用 Where are you from? 回答用 I'm from + 國家名稱。

tips.label: Is he/she from + 國家？
tips.text: 詢問「他/她是否來自某國？」用 Is he/she from + 國家？肯定回答 Yes, he/she is.，否定回答 No, he/she isn't.

notes.title: Where are you from?（詢問你的國籍）
notes.rule: Where are you from? I'm from + 國家.
notes.description: 用 Where are you from? 詢問某人的國籍。回答用 I'm from + 國家名稱。
examples: Where are you from? I'm from Taiwan.
Where are you from? I'm from Japan.

notes.title: Is he/she from + 國家？（詢問他人的國籍）
notes.rule: Is he/she from + 國家? Yes, he/she is. / No, he/she isn't. He/She's from + 另一國家.
notes.description: 詢問第三者是否來自某國。否定回答可加上他們實際來自哪裡。
examples: Is she from India? Yes, she is.
Is he from the UK? No, he isn't. He's from the USA.
Is she from Japan? No, she isn't. She's from Singapore.
Is he from Spain? Yes, he is.

quiz.question: ___ are you from? I'm from Taiwan.
quiz.hint: 詢問來自哪裡用 Where。

quiz.question: I'm from ___. (新加坡)
quiz.hint: Singapore = 新加坡。

quiz.hint: 問 Is she? 肯定回答用 she is.

quiz.hint: 否定回答 No, he isn't.
